informaiton: date of entry - date the stay began.
75 AB2 AB2_ADMIT_FROM (AB2) Admitted From CHAR 1 Demographic information: admitted form (at entry). 1 = Private home/apt. with no home health services, 2 = Private home/apt. with home health services, 3 = Board and care/assisted living/group home, 4 = Nursing Home, 5 = Acute Care Hospital, 6 = Psychiatric Hospital, MR/DD facility, 7 = Rehabilitation Hospital, 8 = Other, "-" = Unknown
76 AB3 AB3_LIVED_ALONE (AB3) Lived Alone Prior to Entry CHAR 1
